chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Virtue of Fasting

text:
1776 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: فِي قَوْلِ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ: «۝ وَ اِسْتَعِينُوا بِالصَّبْرِ وَ اَلصَّلاٰةِ ۝»
قَالَ «يَعْنِي بِالصَّبْرِ اَلصَّوْمَ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1776 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said regarding the saying of Allah (swt), the Almighty: "And seek help through patience and prayer" (Surah Al-Baqarah 2:45):
(Imam (as) said) "By patience, it means fasting."
